title: Contour Density で 多峰性データの密度地形を読む
novelty_reason: 同じ散布点を連続的な密度場として再構成し、局所ピーク・尾根・鞍部を 1 枚で比較できるようにしたためです。
why_it_works: 等高線は件数そのものより勾配の形を強調するため、クラスタが部分的に重なる場面でも境界の読み分けがしやすくなります。
how_to_read: 閉じた輪が局所的な高密度領域を表し、線間隔が広いほど密度勾配は緩やかです。
まず等高線の入れ子の深さを比較し、その後にサンプル点で元データの集中位置を確認します。
transform_js: const rawPoints = Array.isArray(rawData.points) ? rawData.points : []; const boundsRaw = rawData && typeof rawData.bounds === 'object' && rawData.bounds ? rawData.bounds : {}; const xMin = Number.isFinite(Number(boundsRaw.xMin)) ? Number(boundsRaw.xMin) : 0; const xMax = Number.isFinite(Number(boundsRaw.xMax)) ? Number(boundsRaw.xMax) : 100; const yMin = Number.isFinite(Number(boundsRaw.yMin)) ? Number(boundsRaw.yMin) : 0; const yMax = Number.isFinite(Number(boundsRaw.yMax)) ? Number(boundsRaw.yMax) : 100; const step = Math.max(1, Number.isFinite(Number(boundsRaw.step)) ? Number(boundsRaw.step) : 4); const levelCountRaw = Number(rawData.level_count); const levelCount = Math.max(3, Math.min(12, Number.isFinite(levelCountRaw) ? Math.round(levelCountRaw) : 8)); const points = rawPoints.map((p) => ({ x: Number(p && p.x != null ? p.x : 0), y: Number(p && p.y != null ? p.y : 0), weight: Math.max(0, Number(p && p.weight != null ? p.weight : 1)), sigma: Math.max(1, Number(p && p.sigma != null ? p.sigma : 8)) })).filter((p) => Number.isFinite(p.x) && Number.isFinite(p.y) && Number.isFinite(p.weight) && Number.isFinite(p.sigma) && p.weight > 0); const xs = []; const ys = []; for (let x = xMin; x <= xMax + 1e-9; x += step) { xs.push(Number(x.toFixed(6))); } for (let y = yMin; y <= yMax + 1e-9; y += step) { ys.push(Number(y.toFixed(6))); } let transformed = { bounds: { xMin: xMin, xMax: xMax, yMin: yMin, yMax: yMax }, step: step, points: points.map((p) => [p.x, p.y, p.weight]), heatmapData: [], contourSegments: [], densityMin: 0, densityMax: 1, levelCount: 1 }; if (points.length > 0 && xs.length > 1 && ys.length > 1) { const xCount = xs.length; const yCount = ys.length; const grid = new Array(xCount * yCount).fill(0); const indexOf = (ix, iy) => iy * xCount + ix; for (let iy = 0; iy < yCount; iy += 1) { const gy = ys[iy]; for (let ix = 0; ix < xCount; ix += 1) { const gx = xs[ix]; let density = 0; for (let pi = 0; pi < points.length; pi += 1) { const p = points[pi]; const dx = gx - p.x; const dy = gy - p.y; const sigma2 = p.sigma * p.sigma; density += p.weight * Math.exp(-(dx * dx + dy * dy) / (2 * sigma2)); } grid[indexOf(ix, iy)] = density; } } let dMin = Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY; let dMax = Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY; for (let gi = 0; gi < grid.length; gi += 1) { const d = grid[gi]; if (d < dMin) { dMin = d; } if (d > dMax) { dMax = d; } } if (!Number.isFinite(dMin) || !Number.isFinite(dMax)) { dMin = 0; dMax = 1; } const levels = []; if (dMax > dMin) { const start = dMin + (dMax - dMin) * 0.18; const end = dMin + (dMax - dMin) * 0.88; for (let li = 0; li < levelCount; li += 1) { const t = levelCount === 1 ? 0 : li / (levelCount - 1); levels.push(start + (end - start) * t); } } else { levels.push(dMax); } const crosses = (a, b, threshold) => (a < threshold && b >= threshold) || (a >= threshold && b < threshold); const interpolate = (x1, y1, v1, x2, y2, v2, threshold) => { const dv = v2 - v1; const ratio = Math.abs(dv) < 1e-12 ? 0.5 : (threshold - v1) / dv; return [x1 + (x2 - x1) * ratio, y1 + (y2 - y1) * ratio]; }; const contourSegments = []; for (let li = 0; li < levels.length; li += 1) { const threshold = levels[li]; for (let iy = 0; iy < yCount - 1; iy += 1) { for (let ix = 0; ix < xCount - 1; ix += 1) { const x0 = xs[ix]; const x1 = xs[ix + 1]; const y0 = ys[iy]; const y1 = ys[iy + 1]; const v00 = grid[indexOf(ix, iy)]; const v10 = grid[indexOf(ix + 1, iy)]; const v11 = grid[indexOf(ix + 1, iy + 1)]; const v01 = grid[indexOf(ix, iy + 1)]; const intersections = []; if (crosses(v00, v10, threshold)) { intersections.push(interpolate(x0, y0, v00, x1, y0, v10, threshold)); } if (crosses(v10, v11, threshold)) { intersections.push(interpolate(x1, y0, v10, x1, y1, v11, threshold)); } if (crosses(v11, v01, threshold)) { intersections.push(interpolate(x1, y1, v11, x0, y1, v01, threshold)); } if (crosses(v01, v00, threshold)) { intersections.push(interpolate(x0, y1, v01, x0, y0, v00, threshold)); } if (intersections.length === 2) { contourSegments.push([intersections[0][0], intersections[0][1], intersections[1][0], intersections[1][1], li, threshold]); } else if (intersections.length === 4) { const center = (v00 + v10 + v11 + v01) / 4; if (center >= threshold) { contourSegments.push([intersections[0][0], intersections[0][1], intersections[1][0], intersections[1][1], li, threshold]); contourSegments.push([intersections[2][0], intersections[2][1], intersections[3][0], intersections[3][1], li, threshold]); } else { contourSegments.push([intersections[0][0], intersections[0][1], intersections[3][0], intersections[3][1], li, threshold]); contourSegments.push([intersections[1][0], intersections[1][1], intersections[2][0], intersections[2][1], li, threshold]); } } } } } const heatmapData = []; for (let iy = 0; iy < yCount; iy += 1) { for (let ix = 0; ix < xCount; ix += 1) { heatmapData.push([xs[ix], ys[iy], Number(grid[indexOf(ix, iy)].toFixed(6))]); } } transformed = { bounds: { xMin: xMin, xMax: xMax, yMin: yMin, yMax: yMax }, step: step, points: points.map((p) => [p.x, p.y, p.weight]), heatmapData: heatmapData, contourSegments: contourSegments, densityMin: dMin, densityMax: dMax, levelCount: levels.length }; } transformedData = transformed;
echarts_js:
const bounds = transformedData && transformedData.bounds ? transformedData.bounds : { xMin: 0, xMax: 100, yMin: 0, yMax: 100 }; const points = Array.isArray(transformedData && transformedData.points) ? transformedData.points : []; const contourSegments = Array.isArray(transformedData && transformedData.contourSegments) ? transformedData.contourSegments : []; const levelCount = Math.max(1, Number(transformedData && transformedData.levelCount != null ? transformedData.levelCount : 1)); option = { animation: false, grid: { left: 56, right: 40, top: 28, bottom: 46 }, xAxis: { type: 'value', min: bounds.xMin, max: bounds.xMax, name: 'x', axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#64748b' } }, axisLabel: { color: '#475569' }, splitLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#e2e8f0' } } }, yAxis: { type: 'value', min: bounds.yMin, max: bounds.yMax, name: 'y', axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#64748b' } }, axisLabel: { color: '#475569' }, splitLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#e2e8f0' } } }, tooltip: { trigger: 'item', formatter: (params) => { if (params.seriesName === 'samples') { return '?????
x: ' + Number(params.value[0]).toFixed(1) + '
y: ' + Number(params.value[1]).toFixed(1) + '
weight: ' + Number(params.value[2]).toFixed(2); } if (params.seriesName === 'contours') { const level = Number(params.value && params.value[4]); return '??????: ' + String(Number.isFinite(level) ? level + 1 : '-'); } return ''; } }, visualMap: [{ show: false, min: 0, max: Math.max(0, levelCount - 1), dimension: 4, seriesIndex: 0, inRange: { color: ['#0ea5e9', '#2563eb', '#4f46e5', '#7c3aed', '#be185d'] } }], series: [{ name: 'contours', type: 'custom', coordinateSystem: 'cartesian2d', data: contourSegments, silent: false, renderItem: (params, api) => { const x1 = api.value(0); const y1 = api.value(1); const x2 = api.value(2); const y2 = api.value(3); const levelIndex = api.value(4); const p1 = api.coord([x1, y1]); const p2 = api.coord([x2, y2]); const stroke = api.visual('color'); const width = 1.1 + (levelCount > 1 ? (Number(levelIndex) / (levelCount - 1)) * 0.9 : 0); return { type: 'line', shape: { x1: p1[0], y1: p1[1], x2: p2[0], y2: p2[1] }, style: { stroke: stroke, lineWidth: width, opacity: 0.96 } }; }, z: 24 }, { name: 'samples', type: 'scatter', data: points, symbolSize: (val) => 4 + Math.sqrt(Math.max(0, Number(val[2] || 0))) * 2, itemStyle: { color: '#0f172a', opacity: 0.55 }, z: 40 }] };
